hero.title: I build web apps that actually work.
hero.tagline: Full-stack developer from Egypt. I care about clean code — but I care more about shipping something that solves the problem.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.message: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you.

about.title: About me
bio: I build web apps with Next.js and React — that's where I do my best work. Over the past few years I've shipped production applications for clients, built internal tools and dashboards, and worked across the stack from component architecture to Express backends. I care about writing clean code, but I care more about shipping something that actually solves the problem.

I've done everything from converting Figma designs into pixel-perfect UIs to building data pipelines and student tracking systems. Currently focused on the React and Next.js ecosystem, and always looking for interesting problems to work on.
certificates: Advanced Full-Stack Web Development — EGFWD | Udacity
Front End Web Development Professional — EGFWD | Udacity
